trigger: LLM generated database connection setup by hardcoding localhost URLs as defaults in service initialization
symptom: Service silently connects to wrong host in non-local environments; fails in Docker/k8s with 'connection refused' on localhost
notes: Hardcoded localhost works in dev but breaks in any containerized or multi-host deployment. LLMs frequently generate this as 'sensible defaults' without env-var fallback. Always gate behind os.environ.get().
